Spring 2021

NUR 325 - Nursing Research           Credits: 3.0  Grade: A

Spring 2022

NUR 350 - Maternal Obstetric Nursing Credits: 3.0  Grade: A

Fall 2022
NUR 360 - Pediatric Nursing          Credits: 3.0  Grade: A-
NUR 370 - Community Health Nursing   Credits: 3.0  Grade: B+

This is to certify that the above-named student has satisfactorily completed all requirements for the Bachelor of Science in Nursing degree.
